title: Arthritis Pain Relief: The Isometric Brain Hack
description: Isometric exercise — contracting a muscle without moving the joint — produces measurable, lasting pain relief in arthritic hips through changes in central pain processing, not structural repair. The counterintuitive finding: low-intensity contractions held for long durations outperform high-effort work for analgesia. This piece explains the mechanism, the optimal protocol, and why most arthritis patients are either avoiding exercise entirely or doing it wrong.
